name: animata-swap-text
title: Swap Text
author: Animata
description: Swaps between two caller-provided text values on click or hover.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Exposed only the visually current phrase as the button accessible name, marked visual duplicates aria-hidden, and exposed persistent click state with aria-pressed.
Reduced the transform from 1000ms to 300ms, added a reduced-motion path, and synchronized optional hover behavior with keyboard focus while disabling hover-only behavior when clicks are disabled.
Removed unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports; retained the upstream cn helper required by this item.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import to ../../lib/utils, added a client boundary, made the current phrase the sole accessible name with aria-pressed state, shortened the transition, added reduced-motion handling, and synchronized hover with keyboard focus.
modifications.reason: Preserve the authored two-phrase swap while making its visible state semantic, its optional hover behavior keyboard-equivalent, and its motion bounded and suppressible.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl, lerp, and getDistance exports.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure limited to the upstream cn export used by these components.
